channel.title: Unity on Meisterlama's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Unity on Meisterlama's Blog

item.title: Game Week : Diversity Market
item.description: The Game Week is a week-long game jam organized by Isart Digital. Students from the school can make a pitch, and other students can join the groups they like. I joined the group of Diversity Market. The main pitch was “A merchant on an intergalactic trading platform”. The gameplay would consist of point’n’click elements, with simple minigames and dialogues with various alien species. The group was made up of 5 game artists, 1 sound designer, and myself (a game programmer).
